subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto them that have believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that the breezes of Revelation may draw them unto the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لتجذبه نفحات الوحی الی مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social)
